title: senecio chodatianus
intro: Senecio chodatianus, also known as Chodat's ragwort, is a species of flowering plant in the daisy family. It has been traditionally used for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antiseptic effects. The plant is believed to offer various health benefits, such as reducing fever, relieving pain, and soothing digestive issues. In herbal preparations, Senecio chodatianus is often used to make teas, infusions, and tinctures, although more research is needed to confirm its efficacy and safety.
